name: Star Funding, Inc.
description_short: Star Funding provides purchase order financing, accounts receivable factoring, and working capital solutions for small to mid-sized businesses needing cash flow support.
description_long:
Star Funding, Inc. is a New York-based financing company that has operated for over 20 years, claiming to have provided more than $1 billion in cash flow support to thousands of clients. The company positions itself as a specialized lender focused on business-to-business and government contract financing rather than consumer lending. Their primary service areas are purchase order (PO) financing, accounts receivable factoring, and working capital solutions tailored to businesses with inventory, production, or receivables management challenges.

Star Funding offers three main product categories: Purchase Order Financing (funding up to 100% of production costs for goods), Small Business Funding (for inventory purchasing and supplier payment term extension), and Accounts Receivable Factoring (converting invoices into immediate working capital). Their recent case studies indicate transaction sizes ranging from $250,000 to $11 million, suggesting they focus on mid-market businesses. The company emphasizes quick approval processes, including same-day approval claims, and positions pricing fairness as a differentiator.

The company distinguishes itself through its 20-year track record, claimed "#1 Provider" status, multi-product approach (combining PO financing and factoring), and focus on underserved markets like federal government contractors and specialty manufacturers. Their success stories span diverse industries including consumer electronics, home furniture, and business services, suggesting broad applicability. The application process is promoted as simple and streamlined.

However, potential clients should note that specific pricing, terms, APR rates, and qualification requirements are not disclosed on the website. The company does not publish customer reviews or third-party ratings visible in the provided content. As a specialized B2B lender, Star Funding is not suitable for personal or consumer lending needs, and their minimum transaction sizes appear significantly higher than typical small business loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 20-year operating history with over $1 billion in total funding disbursed
Funds up to 100% of production costs for purchase orders, reducing client cash flow burden
Multi-product offering combines PO financing, factoring, and working capital solutions under one provider
Recent case studies show transaction experience ranging from $250K–$11M across diverse industries
Claims same-day approval and fast funding processes
Serves specialized niches including federal government contractors and manufacturers
Established physical office (New York-based, verifiable address provided)
cons: No pricing, APR, fees, or qualification criteria disclosed on website
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible
Minimum transaction sizes appear to start at $250K+, excluding very small businesses
Marketing language uses superlatives ('premier,' '#1 provider') without substantiating evidence
No information on turnaround timelines, documentation requirements, or eligibility restrictions
best_for: Small to mid-sized manufacturers needing to fund production for large purchase orders
Businesses with strong receivables seeking to accelerate cash collection through factoring
Government contractors bidding on federal contracts requiring upfront capital
Companies with $250K–$5M+ financing needs that fall outside traditional SBA loan parameters
diagnosis: Star Funding is designed for established small-to-mid-market businesses with commercial transactions, government contracts, or receivables management needs—not for personal, consumer, or micro-business lending. The primary caveat is opacity: no published pricing, APR, minimum credit scores, or detailed qualification criteria make it impossible to assess affordability or eligibility without direct inquiry.
services: Purchase order financing (up to 100% of production funding)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 237 W 37th St 5th floor, New York, NY 10018
meta_description: Star Funding provides purchase order financing, accounts receivable factoring, and working capital solutions for small to mid-sized businesses.
